description_long: This is a large, elegant house set on a spacious, fenced green lot with manicured landscaping and multiple outdoor features. The house has a symmetrical facade with a prominent central entryway, flanked by two wings and topped with a complex, dark gabled roof. The front features a wide driveway, a stone path, and a covered porch supported by columns, while the rear includes a patio area and additional outdoor seating. The property is adorned with decorative elements such as a fountain, a gazebo, and a large tree, enhancing its upscale residential character. Windows are arranged in balanced rows, and the structure appears to have two main stories with a partial third level or attic. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, suggesting a Colonial Revival or Neo-Colonial architectural style.
description: A grand, two-story Colonial Revival house with a dark gabled roof, symmetrical facade, and extensive landscaped grounds featuring a driveway, porch, and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, wide driveway, stone path, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fenced yard, large tree, and side porch with visible outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, secondary entry, and additional outdoor living spaces.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the gazebo, more of the fenced yard, and side architectural details.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with double doors, wide steps, covered porch, and classical columns
